result.stdout:
SqlBrowser

Usage: sqlbrowser [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  Server            A positional parameter that must be specified.
                    The server name.

Options:
  -p|--port <PORT>  An optional parameter, with a default value.
                    The port to connect in sqlbrowser.
  -?|-h|--help      Show help information
